item.title: Welcome to the PATH: Isolating Legacy Perl to Reduce Cognitive Load
item.description: On February 27, 2026, I had a meeting with my team lead, Pascal. The invite simply said “Discussion Marine <> Pascal”. I wondered if I had done something wrong. That is why my first reaction to

item.title: How to Start a Blog (in a Weekend)
item.description:
Why Start a Blog?
I started my blog for three reasons: to show my work and document my progress, to build authority in my field, and because writing is way easier than creating videos or podcasts.
